name: Back Rank Mate
explain: The enemy King is trapped on its back rank by its OWN pawns! Rook or Queen slides in.

name: Smothered Mate
explain: The King is smothered by its OWN pieces! Only a Knight delivers this special mate!

name: Ladder Mate
explain: Two Rooks take turns pushing the King to the edge — like climbing a ladder!

name: Arabian Mate
explain: Rook and Knight team up in the corner! Knight covers escapes, Rook delivers check.

name: Scholar's Mate
explain: Learn this to AVOID it — Queen+Bishop attack F7! Defend with Nf6!
